channel.title: Quant Finance on Zymacs
channel.description: Recent content in Quant Finance on Zymacs

item.title: Screwy Pirates Q1
item.description:
This is the firs post am making in this series. For all the posts in the series, I plan to share my solutions to the problems in the book “A Practical Guide to Quantitative Finance Interviews” by Zhou Xinfeg. The first set of problems is brain teasers so let’s get to the first one.

Screwy Pirates Problem Statement.

Five pirates looted a chest of 100 gold coins. They agreed on the following method to divide the loot.
